title: negundo interior
intro: Negundo interior, also known as Vitex negundo, is a flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Negundo interior include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Negundo interior is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health ailments.
